title: Ghost Marriages (Minghun) (Ancient China)
script: Imagine being single for your entire life... and then your family forces you to get married AFTER you die! In ancient China, dying single meant facing an eternity of loneliness. To fix this, families arranged 'Ghost Marriages'. They would literally find two single dead people, dress paper effigies of them in incredibly vibrant traditional red wedding clothes, and hold a massive, beautiful ceremony before burying them side-by-side! Because true love never dies... it just waits for your relatives to hook you up. Check the Weird History link in the description for more!

scenes.prompt: Hyper-realistic portrait photography of a jaw-droppingly gorgeous ancient Chinese woman with beautiful features, wearing pristine historical red silk robes. Looking directly at the camera. 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, documentary style realism, highly detailed, shot on 35mm lens, photorealistic. No painting.
